description: Generic state machine engine with named states, guarded transitions, entry/exit actions, history tracking, and lifecycle validation rules.

actors.name: Machine Administrator
actors.description: Defines and configures state machine definitions

actors.name: Entity Actor
actors.description: Triggers events that cause state transitions on entities

actors.name: State Machine Engine
actors.description: Evaluates guards, executes transitions, and records history

validation.message: Machine ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens
Machine name must be 200 characters or fewer

exactly_one_initial_state.description: Every state machine definition must have exactly one state marked as initial. This is the state assigned when a new entity is created. Zero or multiple initial states are a configuration error.

at_least_one_terminal_state.description: Every state machine definition must have at least one state marked as terminal. Terminal states represent completed lifecycles and do not allow outgoing transitions.

no_orphan_states.description: Every non-initial state must be reachable from the initial state via at least one chain of transitions. States with no incoming transitions (except the initial state) are configuration errors.

deterministic_transitions.description: For any given (current_state, event) pair, at most one transition may be eligible after guard evaluation. If multiple transitions share the same from-state and event, their guard conditions must be mutually exclusive to ensure deterministic behavior.

terminal_states_no_outgoing.description: States marked as terminal must not have any outgoing transitions defined. Attempting to add a transition from a terminal state is a configuration error.

history_immutable.description: Transition history entries are append-only. Once recorded, history entries cannot be modified or deleted to ensure a complete audit trail.

guard_expressions_validated.description: Guard expressions on transitions must be valid expressions using the FDL expression syntax. Invalid guards are rejected at configuration time, not at transition time.

on_enter_exit_actions.description: Entry and exit actions on states execute automatically during transitions. Exit actions of the source state run before entry actions of the target state. Action failures cause the transition to roll back.

given: administrator provides state machine definition with states and transitions
exactly one initial state is defined
at least one terminal state is defined
machine_definition_created.result: State machine definition validated and created successfully

given: an event is dispatched for an entity with a current state
a transition exists from current state matching the event
the transition guard evaluates to true (or has no guard)

then.description: Execute exit actions of source state
Execute entry actions of target state
Append transition record with from, to, event, actor, and timestamp

transition_executed.result: Entity transitions to new state with all actions executed and history recorded

given: an event is dispatched for an entity with a current state
a transition exists from current state matching the event
the transition guard evaluates to false
transition_guard_blocks.result: Transition blocked because guard condition is not satisfied

given: an event is dispatched for an entity
no transition exists from the current state matching the event
no_valid_transition.result: Event ignored because no transition is defined for this state and event combination

given: an event is dispatched for an entity in a terminal state
transition_from_terminal_rejected.result: Event rejected because entity is in a terminal state with no outgoing transitions

given: a new entity is created for a registered state machine

then.description: Set to the machine's initial state
Execute entry actions of the initial state

entity_initialized.result: New entity assigned to the initial state with entry actions executed

definition_validation_fails.result: State machine definition rejected due to validation errors

given: an entry action, exit action, or transition action throws an error
transition_action_fails.result: Transition rolled back and entity remains in original state

errors.message: State machine definition is invalid. Check initial/terminal states, orphan states, and transition determinism.
No transition defined for the given state and event combination.
Transition guard condition evaluated to false. The transition is not allowed.
Entity is in a terminal state and cannot transition further.
A transition action failed. The transition has been rolled back.
The specified state machine definition does not exist.
A state machine with this ID already exists.

events.name: state_machine.created
events.description: A new state machine definition was created

events.name: state_machine.transitioned
events.description: An entity transitioned from one state to another

events.name: state_machine.transition_blocked
events.description: A transition was blocked by a guard condition

events.name: state_machine.entity_initialized
events.description: A new entity was assigned to its initial state

events.name: state_machine.action_failed
events.description: An action during transition failed causing rollback

related.reason: Automation rules can trigger events that drive state machine transitions
Approval workflows can be modeled as state machines with approval/rejection transitions
Task lifecycle (open, in progress, done) can be managed by a state machine
Bulk operations may trigger state transitions on multiple entities simultaneously

goals.description: Generic state machine engine with named states, guarded transitions, entry/exit actions, history tracking, and lifecycle validation rules.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts

tradeoffs.reason: workflow steps must complete correctly before proceeding
